mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.name, h.province_id AS provinceId, h.category_id AS categoryId, h.level, h.intro, h.description, h.img_url AS imgUrl, h.video_url AS videoUrl, h.declaration_year AS declarationYear, h.code, h.inheritor, h.create_time AS createTime, h.update_time AS updateTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName, c.code AS categoryCode FROM heritage h LEFT JOIN province p ON h.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON h.category_id = c.id ORDER BY h.id

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.province_id AS provinceId, h.category_id AS categoryId, h.level, h.intro, h.description, h.img_url AS imgUrl, h.video_url AS videoUrl, h.declaration_year AS declarationYear, h.code, h.inheritor, h.create_time AS createTime, h.update_time AS updateTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName, c.code AS categoryCode FROM heritage h LEFT JOIN province p ON h.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON h.category_id = c.id WHERE h.id = #{id}

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.province_id AS provinceId, h.category_id AS categoryId, h.level, h.intro, h.description, h.img_url AS imgUrl, h.video_url AS videoUrl, h.declaration_year AS declarationYear, h.code, h.inheritor, h.create_time AS createTime, h.update_time AS updateTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName FROM heritage h LEFT JOIN province p ON h.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON h.category_id = c.id WHERE h.province_id = #{provinceId}

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.province_id AS provinceId, h.category_id AS categoryId, h.level, h.intro, h.description, h.img_url AS imgUrl, h.video_url AS videoUrl, h.declaration_year AS declarationYear, h.code, h.inheritor, h.create_time AS createTime, h.update_time AS updateTime, p.province_name AS provinceName, c.name AS categoryName FROM heritage h LEFT JOIN province p ON h.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON h.category_id = c.id WHERE h.category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM heritage WHERE level = '国家级'
